name: Hidden Files and Directories Creation
description: Detects creation of hidden files using attrib +h on Windows or dot-prefix on Unix
query:
// Detect hiding files via attrib or dot-prefix
// Trigger on attrib +h or creation of hidden directories
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(attrib\s+\+h|mkdir\s+\.|cp.*\s+\.)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 2
within 120 seconds
